articles.title: Malkin gets 2 goals in his return from suspension as the Penguins beat the NHL-leading Avalanche 7-2
articles.original_title: Malkin gets 2 goals in his return from suspension as the Penguins beat the NHL-leading Avalanche 7-2
articles.summary: Evgeni Malkin scored twice in a four-goal first period and added an assist in his return from a five-game suspension for slashing, sparking the Pittsburgh Penguins to a 7-2 victory over the league-leading Colorado Avalanche on Monday night.  Malkin's punishment from the NHL was for raising his stick and striking Buffalo Sabres defenseman Rasmus Dahlin on the helmet and shoulder during their game on March 5.  The 39-year-old Malkin has been suspended three times in his career.

articles.title: Wembanyama powers Spurs past Clippers 119-115 after wild swings and a late scare to reach 50 wins
articles.original_title: Wembanyama powers Spurs past Clippers 119-115 after wild swings and a late scare to reach 50 wins
articles.summary: Victor Wembanyama had 21 points and 13 rebounds, and the San Antonio Spurs overcame an early 14-point deficit before blowing most of a 24-point lead and recovering to hold off the Los Angeles Clippers 119-115 on Monday night.  Stephon Castle had 23 points, eight assists and seven rebounds to lead the Spurs (50-18), who reached 50 wins for the first time since 2016-17 and trail the first-place Thunder by three games in the West.  Devin Vassell added 20 points.
